title: Sounding Seams EP release
bodyHtml:
I'm so delighted to finally release the full Sounding Seams EP! It features the four songs I wrote for my Sounding Seams III project.

All songs were performed live with Clang Sayne at the Irish National Heritage Park in June 2022, and recorded and mastered by Alexis Nealon.

Big thanks to Aiden Grennelle for all the album artwork, and to David Scott for the beautiful metallography images.
